description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- ci(release): drop orphaned CodeGraph→R2 mirror job by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4649
- Fix desktop app icon background / 修复桌面端图标底色 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4654
- Improve site download guidance / 优化官网下载指引 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4658
- Fix anchored popover scroll positioning / 修复锚定弹层滚动定位 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4662
- 持久化后台 job artifacts by @lifu963 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4644
- fix(agent): smart plan-mode gate with bash read-only validation (#4572) by @ashishexee in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4638
- docs(cli): surface hidden commands and flags in usage text by @opengis-agent in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4639
- Fix workbench titlebar shadow / 修复工作台标题栏残留阴影 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4669
- Backfill MCP servers into global config / 将 MCP 服务器补齐到全局配置 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4668
- fix(session): re-home project sessions stranded by version downgrade / 修复版本降级导致工程会话丢失 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4670
- Prefer global provider credentials / 优先使用全局模型服务凭据 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4671
- Fix workbench dock chrome safety / 修复工作台 Dock 顶部安全区 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4678
- Fix status bar workspace items / 修复信息栏工作区项勾选 by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4677
- Fix planner context isolation across sessions / 修复跨会话规划上下文隔离 by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4675
- fix(cli&desktop): Fix stale scroll and transcript accumulation on session switch / 修复会话切换时滚动偏移与对话累积 by @JesonChou in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4602
- Fix custom no-auth model providers / 修复自定义免密模型接入 by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4685
- Fix settings refresh lag / 优化设置保存响应 by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4680
- fix: keep settings refresh test off generated runtime imports by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4695
- fix: align no-auth provider settings state by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4698
- fix(bash): preserve explicit detached background jobs by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4705
- fix(setup): restore sibling built-in entries when re-running setup wizard by @opengis-agent in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4673
New Contributors
- @opengis-agent made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4639
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.9.0...desktop-v1.9.1
